title: Most polarised State: Supreme Court orders deployment of central forces to protect judges on SIR duty in West Bengal
description: The Supreme Court Thursday took a serious view of the threats posed by protestors to judicial officers posted for Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls in West Bengal and ordered deployment of central armed forces for their safety.Seven judicial officers, including three women judges, involved in the SIR of electoral rolls were gheroaed last evening for hours in Malda district by those protesting their deletion from the voter list.Today, the top court registered a suo motu case tit
